blocks.text: The cost-center accounts came in overnight, so we can start the baseline properly. Before the on-site week, tie the payroll and the contractor spend to the structure by layer, not only by function; the layer view is what shows where the decisions and the cost have drifted apart. And flag any cost center that does not map cleanly to a box on the current chart. Those are usually where the interesting questions sit.

Linda, thank you for turning the accounts around so quickly. On {{fact:f:E-2008-001.client}} we are now where we wanted to be at this point: charts in, accounts in, interviews set. The interview list and times will reach your office today, and Brenda Rodriguez will send your finance team a short list of definitions so we are all counting the same things.
If anything on the list looks wrong to you, say so before the first session and we will fix it then. Otherwise we are in good shape for the on-site weeks.
